titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Asim Ibn Humayd

text: و ما كان فيه عن عاصم بن حميد فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رحمهما اللّه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن عبد الرّحمن بن أبي نجران، عن عاصم بن حميد.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Asim ibn Humayd has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) have mercy on them both - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Abd Al-Rahman ibn Abi Najran, from Asim ibn Humayd.
